label: KB Write Mode
description: How the KB gateway writes a given doc type (CASE-482). Term-backed so the vocabulary is constrained and discoverable; consumed by WRITE_POLICY documents, not by gateway code.

terms.label: Mint
terms.description: Gateway allocates a per-type contiguous number (written as the identity field) and claims a <PREFIX>-<n> Registry synonym atomically. Resolve-then-mint on the policy's search_key; empty search_key always mints fresh.

terms.label: Natural
terms.description: Upsert by the template's own identity_fields (a caller-provided natural key). The default behaviour when no WRITE_POLICY doc exists for a type.
